Bash(PGPASSWORD=rawreporter psql -h localhost -U rawreporter -d rawreporter -c "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS user_roles CASCADE; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS role_permissions CASCADE; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS roles CASCADE; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS permissions CASCADE; SELECT tablename FROM pg_tables WHERE schemaname='public' AND tablename IN \('roles','permissions','role_permissions','user_roles'\) ORDER BY tablename;")
